codeReview.summary: ARCHITECTURE.md is comprehensive and well-structured. It covers proxy design with detailed ASCII diagrams, all required API endpoints (/health, /v1/models, /v1/tools, /v1/chat/completions), configuration options (environment variables, CLI arguments, runtime config), and accurate dependency listings matching package.json version 2.3.20.

issues.description: Minor categorization inconsistency: 'bun-types' is listed under 'Dev Dependencies' in ARCHITECTURE.md but appears as 'peerDependencies' in package.json. This is a documentation labeling issue only - the package and version are correctly listed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ARCHITECTURE.md in the project repository contains substantially more detail than the library/.factory/library/architecture.md template. The project-level ARCHITECTURE.md (166 lines vs 77 lines in library) is comprehensive and appears to be the authoritative source. Consider updating the library template to reference the project's detailed ARCHITECTURE.md.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Repository ARCHITECTURE.md has 166 lines with detailed component descriptions, multiple flow diagrams, and API documentation. Library template has 77 lines with basic overview.

summary: PASS - ARCHITECTURE.md meets all requirements: proxy design explained with diagrams, API endpoints documented (/health, /v1/models, /v1/tools, /v1/chat/completions), configuration options covered, dependencies match package.json. One minor non-blocking documentation categorization issue noted (bun-types peerDependency vs devDependency).
